MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. PEARSE EARLY, Esq. of Reese Law Group (Tel: 760-842-5850) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Judgment.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to vacate judgment is granted.

Order signed.
